nasb.text: “However, I will leave a remnant, for you will have those who escaped the sword among the nations when you are scattered among the countries.

esv.text: “Yet I will leave some of you alive. When you have among the nations some who escape the sword, and when you are scattered through the countries,

cnv.text: “‘但我要保留一些餘剩的人，你們分散在各地的時候，你們必有人在列國中從刀劍下逃出來。

ccb.text: “‘不过，我必为你们留下一些人，使他们脱离刀剑之灾，四散到各国。
